steps.title: Recall the mean formula
steps.content: The mean is found by adding all the values and dividing by how many values there are. Count the data set: 7, 11, 14, 3, 16, 24, 11, 5, 5, 4 — there are 10 values.

steps.title: Add all heights and divide
steps.content:
Sum all the values:
$$7 + 11 + 14 + 3 + 16 + 24 + 11 + 5 + 5 + 4 = 100$$
Divide the sum by the count:
$$\frac{100}{10} = 10$$
The mean height of the plants is 10 centimeters.
